properties.name: spring.ai.test.vcr.enabled
properties.description: Whether to attach the deterministic VCR advisor to every ChatClient.Builder in the context. Off by default: a library that silently starts caching model responses is a library that silently makes a production build pass for the wrong reason.

properties.name: spring.ai.test.vcr.mode
properties.description: Record-and-replay strategy. RECORD_OR_REPLAY replays a fixture if one exists and records on a miss (the default); REPLAY_ONLY replays only, throwing VcrCacheMissException on a miss, intended for CI; RECORD_ALWAYS ignores existing fixtures and always calls the real model, overwriting them; BYPASS performs no reads or writes and always calls the real model.

properties.name: spring.ai.test.vcr.scope
properties.description: Where the advisor sits relative to Spring AI's auto-registered ToolCallingAdvisor. OUTSIDE_TOOL_LOOP wraps the whole tool-calling round-trip in one fixture (fastest, but @Tool methods never run on replay). INSIDE_TOOL_LOOP records one fixture per model turn so real @Tool methods keep executing on every iteration, preserving side-effect assertions.

properties.name: spring.ai.test.vcr.cache-directory
properties.description: Directory holding the JSON fixtures, relative to the module root unless absolute. Fixtures are meant to be committed to version control alongside the tests that produced them.

properties.name: spring.ai.test.vcr.order
properties.description: Explicit advisor order, overriding the value scope would otherwise derive. Leave unset unless the advisor needs to interleave with other custom advisors in a specific position.

properties.name: spring.ai.test.vcr.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Whether to wrap the context's EmbeddingModel bean(s) with the VCR cache. Off by default and independent of spring.ai.test.vcr.enabled: enabling chat caching must never silently start caching embeddings too, and vice versa.

properties.name: spring.ai.test.vcr.embedding.mode
properties.description: Record-and-replay strategy for embedding calls. Same four values and meaning as spring.ai.test.vcr.mode, applied to EmbeddingModel.call(EmbeddingRequest) instead of ChatClient calls.

properties.name: spring.ai.test.vcr.embedding.cache-directory
properties.description: Directory holding the embedding JSON fixtures, relative to the module root unless absolute. Kept separate from spring.ai.test.vcr.cache-directory since embedding fixtures are a structurally different format (VcrEmbeddingTrack, not VcrTrack).
